about_us_slogan: Where Travel Becomes Effortless, Connected, and Empowering
about_us_text:
At Mall of Travels, we believe booking your next trip should be as easy and exciting as shopping your favorite brands online. That’s why we’ve created a smart, all-in-one travel platform where everything you need is in one place, made just for you.

With over 25 years of travel industry expertise, we’ve blended innovation, technology, and customer insight to rethink the way people plan, book, and enjoy travel whether you're a Traveler, a Supplier, or a Brand looking to promote.
one_platform_title: One Platform - All Your Travel Needs
one_platform_caption: Plan your entire trip—flights, hotels, experiences, and activities—in one secure, flexible place, with real-time support, trusted suppliers, and options for every budget.
put_services_title: Put Your Travel Services on the Map
put_services_caption: Manage everything yourself : offer your services, set your prices and connect directly with travelers around the world, controlling visibility and communication.
build_degital_caption: Make your business shine: rent your digital showcase, present your offers and benefit from premium visibility on a platform dedicated to travel.
hotels_flights_caption: Save time and money with our all-in-one travel packages.

who_we_are_caption: Welcome to the platform developed by Noveliatech, at the heart of the IDH Group ecosystem. Our ambition is simple yet powerful: We believe in a world where traveling, selling, and sharing experiences becomes simple, seamless, and accessible to everyone, without borders.
our_mission_caption: We created a platform that transforms the way travel is consumed and distributed.
our_mission_feature1: Offer travelers a complete experience: discover, compare, book, and share
our_mission_feature2: Provide professionals with the tools to sell and expand their offers internationally
our_mission_feature3: Connect all tourism stakeholders within a single digital ecosystem
weel_rounded_caption: Our solution centralizes all travel-related services in an intuitive interface designed to simplify every step.
an_eco_for_everyone_caption:
We are not just a booking website. We designed a digital travel mall where every stakeholder can create value.

Our model is based on a collaborative approach:
for_pros_caption: Publish and manage your offers, and also buy and resell all the products that suit you, thanks to NoveliaTech
brands_and_partners_caption: Benefit from dedicated stores to promote your products
for_travelers_caption: Grow your network and generate revenue through referrals
our_commitment_caption: With NoveliaTech and IDH Group, we are building much more than a platform: We are creating a global travel infrastructure that combines technology, innovation, and economic opportunities. Every day, we bring destinations, stakeholders, and travelers closer together, enabling everyone to experience travel in their own way.
about_home_caption:
We're building much more than just a booking site. With NoveliaTech and the IDH Group ecosystem, we're creating a global platform that connects travelers, professionals, and brands in one place.

Discover, compare, book, sell, and share travel experiences… simply.
